ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing and cost-sharing, with seamless native tool compatibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asheshgoplani/agent-deck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asheshgoplani/agent-deck
Language: go
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: canopy-network/canopy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/canopy-network/canopy
Language: go
The official go implementation of the Canopy Network protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum/EIPs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs
Language: go
The Ethereum Improvement Proposal repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: goharbor/harbor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/goharbor/harbor
Language: go
An open source trusted cloud native registry project that stores, signs, and scans content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gravitational/teleport
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gravitational/teleport
Language: go
The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/consul
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/consul
Language: go
Consul is a distributed, highly available, and data center aware solution to connect and configure applications across dynamic, distributed infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/nomad
Language: go
Nomad is an easy-to-use, flexible, and performant workload orchestrator that can deploy a mix of microservice, batch, containerized, and non-containerized applications. Nomad is easy to operate and scale and has native Consul and Vault integrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/kueue
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kueue
Language: go
Kubernetes-native Job Queueing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: leookun/cursor-byok
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/leookun/cursor-byok
Language: go
Infinite BYOK in Cursor https://github.com/leookun/cursor-byok/releases

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-go
Language: go
OpenTelemetry Go API and SDK

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spf13/viper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spf13/viper
Language: go
Go configuration with fangs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stretchr/testify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stretchr/testify
Language: go
A toolkit with common assertions and mocks that plays nicely with the standard library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trpc-group/trpc-agent-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trpc-group/trpc-agent-go
Language: go
A Go framework for building production agent systems with graph workflows, tools, memory, A2A, AG-UI, MCP, evaluation, and observability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wailsapp/wails
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wailsapp/wails
Language: go
Create beautiful applications using Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xdevplatform/xurl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xdevplatform/xurl
Language: go
The official CLI for the X API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yorukot/superfile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yorukot/superfile
Language: go
Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager
